topStories.description: Former US President Barack Obama on Friday urged Virginia voters to vote “Yes” on a redistricting referendum as early voting continues ahead of the April 21 special election. The measure would let the state legislature temporarily redraw congressional maps

topStories.title: Fifteen South American people deported from the US arrive in DR Congo
topStories.description: The deportees from South America are the first to be sent to the DRC in a deal agreed between Washington and Kinshasa

topStories.description: With the US blockading Iran’s ports, Kharg Island is in focus. How are civilians caught in the middle?

topStories.title: Trump Says US, Iran "Very Close" To Having Peace Deal
topStories.description: Trump's comments came after a series of social media posts in which he touted progress on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and ending Iran's nuclear program.

topStories.title: Widow, 86, back in France after being held by ICE
topStories.description: Marie-Thérèse had moved to the US after reuniting with her long-lost love, an American man who died in January.

topStories.description: US president says most points in a potential Iran deal have been finalised, with talks likely over the weekend; Tehran has yet to confirm the claims

topStories.title: Trump Says US And Iran Are Working Together To Clear Mines From Hormuz Strait
topStories.description: Last week, the New York Times reported that Iran was unable to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz because it could not locate all the mines it laid in the waterway to block the passage amid war.

topStories.title: ‘Insult to Nari Shakti’: Amit Shah fumes at opposition as women's reservation amendment fails in Lok Sabha
topStories.description: Amit Shah said Congress and allies blocked the passage of the essential constitutional amendment for the law granting 33% reservation for women in legislatures.

dailyNews.description: Ozturk says she made the decision to avoid 'losing more time to the state-imposed violence and hostility' under Trump.

dailyNews.description: The TSS refers to the so-called Traffic Separation Scheme, which was adopted by the UN's shipping agency in 1968 with agreement of countries in the region.

dailyNews.title: Trump's big claim after Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz: 'Has agreed to never close it'
dailyNews.description: Hours after Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz is reopened for commercial vessels, US President Donald Trump said the Islamic Republic has agreed to never close it again.

dailyNews.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
dailyNews.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

dailyNews.title: Controversy as Lebanese banker Sehnaoui is praised for supporting Israel
dailyNews.description: Trump envoy Morgan Ortagus says Antoun Sehnaoui is a committed Zionist, even as Israel attacked Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Can Pakistan secure Iran-US nuclear compromise, as Trump says deal ‘close’?
dailyNews.description: Pakistan's civilian and army leaders shuttle between key capitals as Trump says he may visit Islamabad to sign a deal.

dailyNews.title: Daughter of missing American in Bahamas says Brian Hooker using mother's illness as 'excuse' to leave country
dailyNews.description: Daughter of American woman missing in The Bahamas accuses stepfather Brian Hooker of using his mother's illness as an excuse to leave the country.

dailyNews.title: Greg Olsen's advice for NFL Draft first-round picks on handling high expectations
dailyNews.description: Greg Olsen offered advice to 2026 NFL Draft first-round picks on how to handle high expectations that comes with being a top selection next week.

dailyNews.title: Former NYPD officer who fatally threw cooler at fleeing suspect granted bail during appeal of conviction
dailyNews.description: Former NYC police officer Erik Duran, convicted of manslaughter for throwing a cooler at a fleeing suspect, is released on bail pending his appeal.

dailyNews.title: White House reviewing cases of missing, dead scientists for possible links as 11th person identified
dailyNews.description: The White House says it is working with the FBI to review cases of American scientists who have gone missing or died in recent years in a growing list.

dailyNews.title: Garret Anderson, who helped lead Angels to their lone World Series title, dead at 53
dailyNews.description: Garret Anderson, a three-time All-Star and key player in the Los Angeles Angels' 2002 World Series title, has died at 53, the Los Angeles Angels announced.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Illegal street racing 'takeover' explodes as hundreds swarm streets and suspects bolt
dailyNews.description: Police say 18 people were arrested and firearms recovered after an illegal street racing takeover drew 200 to an Atlanta intersection Sunday.

dailyNews.title: UPS plane aborts landing in near miss at same airport where November crash killed 15
dailyNews.description: A UPS cargo jet aborted its landing at Louisville Muhammad Ali International Airport to avoid a smaller aircraft on the runway, reports say.

dailyNews.title: WNBA team's public relations staff shuts down reporter's question about players' relationship
dailyNews.description: The Dallas Wings selected Azzi Fudd with the No. 1 pick, reuniting the UConn alum with Paige Bueckers, who confirmed they were a couple last summer.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Urged to Act on Iranian Site Feared Impervious to Airstrikes
dailyNews.description: Little is known about Pickaxe Mountain, but some experts say it illustrates the impossibility of relying on force alone to prevent Iran from acquiring a nuclear bomb.

dailyNews.title: Prosecutor Withdraws From Trump Team’s Investigation of Ex-CIA Director John O. Brennan
dailyNews.description: A career Justice Department lawyer, Maria Medetis Long, in Miami is said to have raised concerns about whether the evidence justified moving forward with a bid to prosecute John O. Brennan.

dailyNews.title: The 27-Year-Old Diplomat Waging Trump’s Cultural War With Europe
dailyNews.description: Five years out of college, Samuel Samson has driven the Trump administration’s push to upend America’s postwar relationship with Europe.

dailyNews.title: Federal Appeals Court Opens Door to Moving Trans Inmates Under Trump Gender Order
dailyNews.description: A three-judge panel gave a group of 17 transgender women a few weeks to seek further recourse in court before their transfer to men’s facilities could take effect.

dailyNews.title: Lutnick Says Canada Trade Deal Needs to Be Reworked Ahead of Talks
dailyNews.description: Howard Lutnick, President Trump’s commerce secretary, derided Canada’s trade strategy and said a North American deal needed to be reworked.

dailyNews.title: Hundreds of Fake Pro-Trump Avatars Emerge on Social Media
dailyNews.description: The artificial-intelligence-generated fake influencers have surged on TikTok, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube in an apparent bid to hook conservative voters.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will continue blockade after Iran says strait "completely open"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has welcomed Iran's announcement that, at least while the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire holds, the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open" to all ships.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iranians have "agreed to everything," including removal of enriched uranium
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke with CBS News Friday in a new telephone interview.

dailyNews.title: U.S. could send senior officials back to Pakistan for Iran talks within days, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is considering a renewed diplomatic push that could send officials back to Pakistan within days, sources said.

dailyNews.title: White House eyes alleged Utah scandal as GOP frets about redistricting loss
dailyNews.description: White House officials are leaning on Utah Republicans to further examine ethics concerns regarding a relationship between two key players in a key gerrymandering case, sources told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Key details on Trump's latest Strait of Hormuz announcement
dailyNews.description: Iran and President Trump announced that the Strait of Hormuz will now be open, but questions remain about the flow of traffic in the key water passage. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz is open but U.S. blockade will continue
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media claims that the Strait of Hormuz will be "completely open." CBS News' Natalie Brand reports.
